content_accuracy.notes: Accurate coverage of Bloom filters. Correct formulas for optimal parameters. Good explanation of false positive vs false negative guarantees. Variants section is useful.

issues: The hash function implementation using `fnv.New32a()` is adequate but not optimal — production Bloom filters use faster hash functions (e.g., MurmurHash).
The hash mixing approach (appending `byte(i)`) is simplistic and may not provide true independence across k hashes.
